# Anthea

> Anthea is a specialist recruiting partner that helps fast-growing startups hire screened growth and marketing talent. We review, meet, and interview candidates before making introductions, so companies only spend time with people who fit the role.

## What we do
- Source and screen growth and marketing talent for startups
- Review each candidate's background, skills, and growth/marketing fit
- Meet candidates to understand goals and strengths
- Run structured interviews so every candidate is assessed consistently
- Introduce a curated shortlist to the startups that fit them best

## Who we work with
- Companies: fast-growing startups hiring across growth and marketing
- Candidates: early-career talent looking for internships and new grad roles in growth and marketing

## Talent areas
Growth marketing, performance and paid, lifecycle and CRM, content and brand, product marketing, marketing analytics, SEO and organic, community and social.

## How we work
1. Screen — review background, skills, and growth/marketing fit
2. Meet — understand goals, strengths, and what's next
3. Interview — structured, consistent assessment
4. Match — introduce a curated shortlist with context on both sides

## Links
- Home (for startups): https://antheatalent.com/
- For candidates: https://antheatalent.com/candidates
- Get started / contact: https://antheatalent.com/contact
- Email: hello@antheatalent.com
